release: On-device Launch Validation & Final Release Gate
privacy: Artwork, projects and preferences stay on the device unless the person using AIR-DROW explicitly exports, shares or starts an optional AI creation.
releaseGate: npm run vercel:build validates source integrity, local hand assets, bilingual markup, runtime coverage, export/gesture tests, on-device launch-validation checks, cache/version contracts, theme tokens, documentation and generated production output.
support: Use Settings > About App to review app readiness (including local PNG/JPG encoding), hand drawing readiness, language, release information and developer profile.
name: AIR-DROW On-device Launch Validation & Final Release Gate Edition
summary: v8.1.0 adds a local, privacy-preserving preflight for canvas rendering, PNG/JPG encoding and local file preparation while clearly separating those checks from real camera and Android download validation.
releaseName: AIR-DROW On-device Launch Validation & Final Release Gate Edition
